user_task_description: This PDF already has bookmarks, but the bookmark hierarchy does not match the section structure of the document.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Update the PDF bookmarks so `Findings` and `Recommendations` are top-level entries, and `Site A` and `Site B` appear nested under `Findings`.
atomic_scope: Only hierarchy editing in the PDF outline / bookmark structure is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised PDF with corrected bookmark hierarchy.

inspired_by.title: Looking for Best Way to Attach Files to PDF Document
Preview pdf fast or in large grid view?

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The content pages are correct, but the structural navigation layer is wrong
- The incorrect outline is not obvious unless the PDF bookmark tree is inspected
- A correct fix changes hierarchy without rewriting the visible document text
